headline: KKR Announces Intra-Quarter Monetization Activity Update for the First Quarter
summary: NEW YORK, March 23, 2026--KKR today announced income from monetization activity in excess of $700 million with respect to the period from January 1, 2026 through March 23, 2026 based on information available as of today. The quarter-to-date monetization activity is made up of approximately 90% realized performance income and approximately 10% realized investment income.
